content: agent1: implementing fallback_searchpath param for FileSystemLoader in src/jinja2/loaders.py (get_source, list_templates, __init__). Will touch that file.

agent1: I already edited FileSystemLoader in src/jinja2/loaders.py — added fallback_searchpath param to __init__, and updated get_source()/list_templates() to search self.searchpath + self.fallback_searchpath. Changes are isolated to FileSystemLoader class (lines ~151-232 originally). If you're also modifying FileSystemLoader.__init__/get_source/list_templates for path_transform, please pull my current version first or we'll clobber each other. Other loader classes (DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader) are untouched by me — all yours.
